summary: Nice‑sounding recording with solid performance highlighted by Brent’s front‑man energy on keyboards.
review: The three reviewers find the audio surprisingly clear (“really nice sound”) while the show itself is described as mixed – one calls it rough and unremarkable, but two praise Brent Mydland’s playing and stage presence. Overall the set isn’t noted for specific song highlights, but Brent’s keyboard work stands out.

ai_rating.rationale: Two reviewers gave strong positive scores (4‑5) praising the performance and sound, while one gave a modest 3 noting an unremarkable show; average rating ~4 with limited data yields medium confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: One reviewer explicitly mentions the recording sounds "really nice"; no details on soundboard vs audience, but overall audio quality is viewed positively.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set structure or pacing were provided.

band_member_comments.Keys: Brent is praised for stepping into a front‑man role and delivering "crazy" keyboard work.
